manufacturer: Aurora Construction Materials Epping Pty Ltd
pcr: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products v2.0.1 (2025-06-05); c-PCR-003 Concrete and Concrete Elements (2025-04-08)

verification.verifier: Claudia A. Peña, PINDA LCT SpA

scope: Cradle to gate (A1-A3) with modules C1-C4 and D; A4-A5 not declared
notes: Product stage reported combined only (Table 10: A1-A3 GWP-total = 140 kg CO2e per m3); no individual A1/A2/A3 split published despite all three being marked declared in the scope table (p7) → A1/A2/A3 = 'incl'.
A4 and A5 (and all of B1-B7) are ND — scope is cradle-to-gate (A1-A3) plus end-of-life (C1-C4, D) only; construction and use stages excluded as no typical project scenario could be defined (p3, p7).

C1-C4/D use the default end-of-life scenario (84% recycled / 16% landfill per Victorian NWR 2022, PCR Table 4 defaults); Tables 13-14 (pp21-22) give alternative 100%-recycling and 100%-landfill C3/C4/D figures, not used for the headline gwp_total.

GWP-fossil (140) equals GWP-total (140) at A1-A3 because GWP-biogenic is small and negative (-0.24, from a proxy admixture dataset per p12 key-assumptions note) and GWP-luluc is small and positive (0.0119); fossil+biogenic+luluc ≈ 139.77 ≈ A1A3 within tolerance.

Table 9 (p16) is only an indicator-name legend for EN 15804+A1; the actual +A1 GWP figure is in Table 12 (p20, GWP = 139 kg CO2e at A1-A3). Source text never uses the word 'CML'; methodology labeled 'EN 15804+A1 / CML' per corpus convention for this alternate-methodology field. Table 12's own footnote cautions these 'A1 indicators' use +A1 characterisation factors but +A2 system boundaries/allocation, so are not strictly EN 15804+A1-compliant — retained only to power a 'not comparable' warning.

No single combined total-energy-use figure (kWh or MJ) is reported — PERT (34.1 MJ) and PENRT (1200 MJ) are declared separately at A1-A3 (Table 11, p19) → summary_extras.total_energy_use_kwh_a1a3 omitted.
Registration in-doc 'EPD-IES-0021754:001' (revision 001) matches the filename's '0021754-001' exactly — no id mismatch.
Single product, single production site (Rockbank, VIC) — doc explicitly states 'EPD of a single product from a manufacturer (from one location)' (p1).
